entries.source: Important events, facts learned, and uncertainty notes stay visible.
entries.value: Pomembni dogodki, naučena dejstva in opombe o negotovosti ostanejo vidni.

entries.source: In 4 sentences, explain how one assumption change moves revenue, cash flow, and value. Name one thing you would check before trusting it.
entries.value: V 4 stavkih pojasni, kako ena sprememba predpostavke vpliva na prihodke, denarni tok in vrednost. Navedi eno stvar, ki bi jo preveril, preden ji zaupaš.

entries.source: Increase the challenge. Have the historical person defend their worldview more forcefully while the historian tracks weak claims.
entries.value: Povečaj izziv. Naj zgodovinska oseba odločneje brani svoj pogled na svet, medtem ko zgodovinar spremlja šibke trditve.

entries.source: Individual crowd interactions are plausible composites
entries.value: Posamezne interakcije v množici so verjetni sestavki

entries.source: Individual routes through smoke are plausible, not exact
entries.value: Posamezne poti skozi dim so verjetne, ne natančne

entries.source: Interpret the target internally and begin immediately with a real diagnostic question.
entries.value: Cilj si razloži interno in takoj začni z resničnim diagnostičnim vprašanjem.

entries.source: Invite a figure into the room.
It definitely rises because sales are higher.
entries.value: Zagotovo zraste, ker je prodaja višja.

entries.source: It helps you explain profit potential, not just market size.
entries.value: Pomaga ti pojasniti potencial dobička, ne le velikost trga.

entries.source: It helps you predict policy, taxes, shortages, and market reactions without memorizing diagrams.
entries.value: Pomaga ti napovedati politike, davke, pomanjkanja in odzive trga, ne da bi se moral učiti diagramov na pamet.

entries.source: It is impossible to know anything until terminal value is calculated.
entries.value: Nemogoče je vedeti karkoli, dokler ni izračunana terminalna vrednost.

entries.source: It lets you revise for logic, not just polish wording.
entries.value: Omogoča ti popravljanje logike, ne le piljenje besedila.

entries.source: It makes you faster because each test either proves or removes a hypothesis.
entries.value: Hitrejši si, ker vsak preizkus hipotezo bodisi potrdi bodisi odstrani.

entries.source: It may fall because costs and working capital can absorb the sales gain.
entries.value: Lahko pade, ker lahko stroški in obratni kapital posrkajo rast prodaje.

entries.source: Jumps to valuation before reading the operating model.
entries.value: Skoči na vrednotenje, preden prebere operativni model.
Kashmere Gate je bil vojaško pomemben

entries.source: Keep governance, money, labor, technology, and culture in view.
entries.value: Ohrani v vidnem polju upravljanje, denar, delo, tehnologijo in kulturo.

entries.source: Keep the sidecar quieter unless something needs correction.
entries.value: Naj bo stranska plošča tišja, razen če je treba kaj popraviti.

entries.source: Kingdom of England under Charles II
Kingdom of France in revolutionary crisis
Learn how they thought, worked, planned, wrote, governed, or experimented.
entries.value: Spoznaj, kako so razmišljali, delali, načrtovali, pisali, vladali ali eksperimentirali.

entries.source: Learn supply and demand by working through examples
entries.value: Nauči se ponudbe in povpraševanja z obravnavo primerov
Pravni status je oblikoval vsakdanje življenje

entries.source: List what has to be true for the idea to work.
entries.value: Naštej, kaj mora držati, da ideja deluje.

entries.source: Listing the five labels without judging their strength does not explain whether the industry is attractive.
entries.value: Naštevanje petih oznak brez presoje njihove moči ne pojasni, ali je panoga privlačna.

entries.source: Literate helper near records, letters, or multilingual exchange
entries.value: Pismen pomočnik pri zapisih, pismih ali večjezični izmenjavi

entries.source: Livres, sous, bread prices as daily pressure
entries.value: Livri, sousi in cene kruha kot vsakodnevni pritisk

entries.source: Local working language with class-appropriate fluency
entries.value: Lokalni delovni jezik z razredu primerno tekočnostjo

entries.source: Lock useful notes only after the idea has been used.
entries.value: Uporabne zapiske zakleni šele po tem, ko je bila ideja uporabljena.

entries.source: Look for the causal link. Which variable actually changed, and what does it affect next?
entries.value: Poišči vzročno povezavo. Katera spremenljivka se je dejansko spremenila in na kaj vpliva potem?

entries.source: Make the first rough structure before giving advice. Start with: "I made the first rough structure. Edit anything. I will react to your changes."
entries.value: Pred svetovanjem naredi prvo grobo strukturo. Začni z: "Naredil sem prvo grobo strukturo. Uredi, kar želiš. Odzval se bom na tvoje spremembe."

entries.source: Manipulation proves you can use the model, not just repeat it.
entries.value: Manipulacija dokazuje, da znaš model uporabiti, ne le ponoviti.

entries.source: Map allies, enemies, critics, patrons, and pressure groups around this person at this moment.
entries.value: Prikaži zemljevid zaveznikov, sovražnikov, kritikov, pokroviteljev in interesnih skupin okoli te osebe v tem trenutku.
Tržni liki so sestavljeni iz več virov

entries.source: Market street near Chandni Chowk during the siege
entries.value: Tržna ulica blizu Chandni Chowka med obleganjem

entries.source: market, household, workshop, port, school, or neighborhood
entries.value: trg, gospodinjstvo, delavnica, pristanišče, šola ali soseska

entries.source: Markets move when incentives change. Demand captures willingness to buy, supply captures willingness to sell, and price is where the pressure balances.
entries.value: Trgi se premaknejo, ko se spremenijo spodbude. Povpraševanje zajame pripravljenost za nakup, ponudba zajame pripravljenost za prodajo, cena pa je točka, kjer se pritiski uravnotežijo.
Trgi delujejo znotraj časovno določenih omejitev

entries.source: Markets, homes, workshops, courts, maps, and decision points.
entries.value: Trgi, domovi, delavnice, sodišča, zemljevidi in odločitvene točke.
Obvladovanje = priklic + uporaba + povratne informacije + prenos.
Študent MBA, ki preučuje institucionalno zasnovo

entries.source: Merge the accepted changes into a clean current version, then update the decision log and open questions.
entries.value: Sprejete spremembe združi v čisto trenutno različico, nato posodobi dnevnik odločitev in odprta vprašanja.
Michelangelov David je bil postavljen leta 1504

entries.source: Misses become a smaller review deck
entries.value: Zgrešeni odgovori postanejo manjši komplet za ponavljanje

entries.source: Missing the curfew or ignoring official rank can quickly become dangerous.
entries.value: Če zamudiš policijsko uro ali prezreš uradni položaj, lahko hitro postane nevarno.

entries.source: Modern assumptions about equal citizenship would be immediately out of place.
entries.value: Sodobne predpostavke o enakem državljanstvu bi bile takoj neprimerne.

entries.source: Modern talk of individual artistic genius can sound naive without patronage, guild, and civic context.
entries.value: Sodobno govorjenje o individualnem umetniškem geniju lahko brez konteksta pokroviteljstva, cehov in mesta zveni naivno.

entries.source: More immersive, with tighter limits on what you can know and say.
entries.value: Bolj poglobljeno, s strožjimi omejitvami glede tega, kaj lahko veš in poveš.

entries.source: Move carefully and notice ordinary life before judging.
entries.value: Premikaj se previdno in opazuj vsakdanje življenje, preden sodiš.

entries.source: Move one control, watch the result, then explain why the output changed.
entries.value: Premakni en kontrolnik, opazuj rezultat, nato pojasni, zakaj se je izhod spremenil.

entries.source: Moving every control at once makes it hard to know what caused the result.
entries.value: Če premakneš vse kontrolnike hkrati, težko veš, kaj je povzročilo rezultat.

entries.source: Moving on after recognition instead of testing recall and transfer.
entries.value: Nadaljevanje po prepoznavi namesto preverjanja priklica in prenosa.

entries.source: Mughal symbolic authority under rebel control, contested by the East India Company
entries.value: Mogulska simbolna oblast pod nadzorom upornikov, ki ji oporeka East India Company

entries.source: Multiple explanations can help, but the proof is what you can do after reading.
entries.value: Več razlag lahko pomaga, dokaz pa je to, kaj znaš narediti po branju.

entries.source: Name the input you changed, the immediate effect, and the final result.
entries.value: Poimenuj vnos, ki si ga spremenil, neposredni učinek in končni rezultat.

entries.source: Name the topic and your current guess. The app builds a ladder of questions, hints, evidence, and synthesis.
entries.value: Poimenuj temo in svojo trenutno domnevo. Aplikacija zgradi lestev vprašanj, namigov, dokazov in sinteze.

entries.source: Napoleon after Austerlitz, Ambedkar in the Constitution committee...
entries.value: Napoleon po Austerlitzu, Ambedkar v ustavnem odboru ...

entries.source: Near Akbar's imperial complex and debate spaces
entries.value: Blizu Akbarjevega cesarskega kompleksa in prostorov za razpravo

entries.source: No full answer unless you ask.
entries.value: Brez celotnega odgovora, razen če ga zahtevaš.

entries.source: Nothing changes unless buyers' tastes change.
entries.value: Nič se ne spremeni, razen če se spremenijo okusi kupcev.

entries.source: Olive oil, dust, bronze, public argument, and the uneasy pride of a wounded democracy.
entries.value: Olivno olje, prah, bron, javna razprava in nelagoden ponos ranjene demokracije.

entries.source: One short concept chunk at a time, with examples that fit your level.
entries.value: En kratek pojmovni sklop naenkrat, s primeri, ki ustrezajo tvoji ravni.

entries.source: One targeted question tests the current understanding.
entries.value: Eno ciljno vprašanje preveri trenutno razumevanje.

entries.source: One tight arrival, three discoveries, and a debrief stamp.
entries.value: En zgoščen prihod, tri odkritja in zaključni žig.

entries.source: Open the evidence drawer. Label high-confidence facts, plausible reconstructions, contested claims, and things you must not fabricate.
entries.value: Odpri predal z dokazi. Označi dejstva z visoko zanesljivostjo, verjetne rekonstrukcije, sporne trditve in stvari, ki jih ne smeš izmišljati.

entries.source: Open the Historical Person mini app as a staged historical audience with a living dossier.
entries.value: Odpri mini aplikacijo Zgodovinska oseba kot uprizorjeno zgodovinsko občinstvo z živim dosjejem.

entries.source: Openings that produce a better encounter.
entries.value: Uvodne poteze, ki ustvarijo boljše srečanje.

entries.source: Optional: paste notes, syllabus points, or facts to prioritize
entries.value: Neobvezno: prilepi zapiske, točke učnega načrta ali dejstva, ki naj imajo prednost
Običajni liki so sestavki, ozaveščeni o dokazih

entries.source: Ordinary reactions are plausible blends of legal and literary evidence
entries.value: Običajni odzivi so verjetne mešanice pravnih in literarnih dokazov

entries.value: Opazovalec izven časa z diskretnim terenskim vodnikom

entries.source: Paste an article, case, or passage
Pick any topic. I will build 10 multiple-choice questions and score you as you go.
entries.value: Izberi katerokoli temo. Sestavil bom 10 vprašanj z več možnimi odgovori in te sproti ocenjeval.

entries.source: Piety is civic, not private only
entries.value: Pobožnost je državljanska, ne le zasebna

entries.source: Plain respectable dress with writing tools
entries.value: Preprosta ugledna obleka s pisalnimi pripomočki

entries.source: Plausible ordinary life should be labelled as reconstruction
entries.value: Verjetno vsakdanje življenje mora biti označeno kot rekonstrukcija

entries.source: Point attention to the relevant part.
Political language can mobilize or endanger
entries.value: Politični jezik lahko mobilizira ali ogrozi

entries.source: Possible gap: short run vs long run
entries.value: Možna vrzel: kratki rok proti dolgemu roku

entries.source: Precise sensory mix at a given stall
entries.value: Natančna čutna mešanica pri določeni stojnici

entries.source: Preferred setting: choose a historically fitting room, court, battlefield tent, study, prison, salon, workshop, public square, or other concrete place.
entries.value: Želena postavitev: izberi zgodovinsko ustrezno sobo, dvor, bojni šotor, študijsko sobo, zapor, salon, delavnico, javni trg ali drug konkreten kraj.

entries.value: Pripravi se na razpravo pri pouku o prevzemu JLR-ja podjetja Tata

entries.value: Pudding Lane, ko se ogenj začne širiti

entries.value: Pudding Lane je povezana z izbruhom požara

entries.value: Vprašalni pozivi, ki poglobijo izmenjavo, ne da bi jo spremenili v predavanje.
